title: 7 Stocks to Buy at the ‘Midterm Elections' Bottom
text: Although the concept of stocks to buy at the ‘midterm elections' bottom seems farfetched considering the broader volatility this year, the calendar might provide a change of heart. According to The New York Times, the U.S. equities sector generally follows election-related patterns.

title: 5 Historically High-Yield Stocks Popular With Gurus
text: As market volatility continues on the back of a disappointing start to tech companies' earnings, rising interest rates and rampant inflation, many investors are looking for some stability in their portfolios.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For November 2022
text: NOBL fell 9.15% in September, which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 17.47%. Thus far this month, through October 24th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.04%, bringing its year-to-date return to -12.49%.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: If you're looking for dividend stocks to buy and hold forever, a good place to start is companies that have done an excellent job increasing their dividends and are expected to keep doing so in the future. The question is where to start.

title: Top Dividend Champion Stocks To Watch - Our Favorites Are Enbridge And T. Rowe Price
text: Dividend champions are elite stocks that have raised dividends for at least 25 consecutive years. They attract income investors. Below, I show how we screen the dividend champions for actionable ideas, one each for high-yield and dividend growth investors.

title: What's in Store for T. Rowe Price (TROW) in Q3 Earnings?
text: T. Rowe Price (TROW) is expected to have witnessed an AUM dip in Q3 due to the equity and fixed-income markets' decline. Inflationary pressures on wages are likely to have been dampening.

title: T. Rowe Price: Rough Seas Today Provide Good Dividend Returns Tomorrow
text: Invest in T. Rowe Price with a high likelihood of maintaining growing dividend payments. The current "Rough Seas" and cyclical price movements create buying opportunities for investors.

title: T. Rowe Price: This Company Is A Gem
text: T. Rowe Price is unfairly underfollowed. The price multiples support my bullish thesis for T. Rowe Price, as they are all at historical lows.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks That Are Too Cheap to Ignore
text: With the massive paradigm shifts that erupted this year, more investors look toward cheap dividend stocks to buy. As inflationary forces diminished the dollar's purchasing power in the first half of this year, many sought to arrest this trajectory through passive income.

title: Organic Growth Aids T. Rowe Price (TROW), High Costs Ail
text: T. Rowe Price's (TROW) organic growth efforts and strong AUM balance will support financials. However, rising costs and the overdependence on investment advisory fees are concerning.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For October 2022
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of October. The watchlist posted a loss of 7.90% in September and is now down 19.73% year-to-date.
